_description: Rules applied per question for Switzerland vs Algeria 2026-07-02/03

match_context.rule8_note: Draw 30.07% ≥ 25%. RULE8 most relevant for Q10 (model estimate), Q9 (model estimate), Q14 (model estimate).

per_question.note: Embolo anytime scorer liquid mid=0.3254. He's SUI's primary striker; Ndoye was top shooter in group but Embolo typically more clinical in knockouts.
Vargas SOT OU1.5 liquid mid=0.1283. Poisson cross-check from OU0.5(0.4951)=0.150. Use direct. Vargas is a wide player; 2+ SOT is a high bar.
BTTS Yes mid=0.5141. ALG OU0.5 Over=62.57%. BTTS price is fair; both teams have reasonable scoring probability.
Gouiri offer=0.2222 ×0.945=0.210. CONCERN: Gouiri was NOT top shooter in any ALG group game (Chaïbi vs ARG, Maza vs JOR and AUT). Market may be overpricing his goal probability.
Mahrez score_or_assist liquid mid=0.2699. He's ALG playmaker; consistent creative role even if not top shooter. S+A captures his assist potential too.
OU2.5 Over mid=0.4350 = P(3+ goals). Total λ=2.422; Poisson P(≥3)=0.437. Consistent.
Most corners Algeria=0.3227 from 3-way market. AH cross-check: P(SUI>ALG)=0.5424. ESPN: SUI avg 6.33 corners, ALG avg 4.0. SUI home team. Algeria corners underdog.
Cards OU4.5 Over=0.1778. Blended with Poisson(λ=2.911)=0.170 → 0.174. Both teams had very clean group stages (SUI: 1 YC/game; ALG: 0.33 YC/game).
Poisson aggregate P(any brace)=0.135. Brace market offers (illiquid): Embolo=0.08→0.064, Itten=0.067→0.054. Blended estimate 0.140. RULE8: competitive match reduces dominant individual scores.

Player-sum λ_SUI_SOT=6.57→P(≥5)=0.784. ESPN avg=6.0→empirical P(≥5)=0.667. RULE12: removing Canada (4 SOT) or either Bosnia/Qatar game shifts estimate significantly. RULE8: shade from 0.667 toward 0.60. Algeria conceded avg 4.33 SOT/game.
HT result Draw=0.4785. Very high HT draw probability reflects competitive match. RULE8 confirms high draw environment.
P(pen OR red) = P(pen=0.2402)+P(red≈0.1262)-P(both=0.0303)=0.336. Red card from 1-mid(No red)=1-0.8738=0.1262.
Team-to-score-first Switzerland=0.5576. Cross-check: FTR SUI win=48.78%, SUI favored → consistent with 55.76% first scorer.
Second hydration break assumed at ~70'. P(goal 70'-90') using 2H λ scaling=0.457, total λ scaling=0.416. Blended=0.437. Uses SH OU0.5 Over=0.7469 → λ_2H=1.374.
To_qualify Switzerland=0.6735. FTR SUI win (48.78%) + ET/PK advancement probability = 67.35%.
